ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT number for tax purposes */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Separate address for shipping */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Separate address for billing */,
  "preferred_currency" TEXT /* Preferred currency for transactions */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, completed) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "order_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "requested_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity requested by the customer */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the part */,
  "extended_price" TEXT /* Extended price of the order item */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the part */,
  "pack_type" TEXT /* Pack type of the part (e.g., Cut Tape, Tray) */,
  "order_item_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the order item */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate applied to the item */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applied to the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "manufacturer_part_number" TEXT /* Manufacturer part number */,
  "digi_key_part_number" TEXT /* Digi-Key part number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "category" INTEGER /* Category of the part */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the part */,
  "minimum_order_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity for the part */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity available */,
  "pack_type" INTEGER /* Pack type of the part (e.g., Cut Tape, Tray) */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part (in days) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the part */,
  "part_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the part */,
  "part_images" TEXT /* URL or path to images of the part */,
  "datasheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the datasheet of the part */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the part details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_pack_type FOREIGN KEY ("pack_type") REFERENCES pack_types ("pack_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the manufacturer's website */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for parts from the manufacturer (in days) */,
  "manufacturer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the supplier's website */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for parts from the supplier (in days) */,
  "supplier_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_suppliers" (
  "part_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part-supplier relationship */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supplier_part_number" TEXT /* Supplier-specific part number */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part from the supplier (in days) */,
  "price_updated" TEXT /* Date when the supplier price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_suppliers_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "part_manufacturers" (
  "part_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part-manufacturer relationship */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_part_number" TEXT /* Manufacturer-specific part number */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for the part from the manufacturer (in days) */,
  "price_updated" TEXT /* Date when the manufacturer price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_manufacturers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_part_manufacturers_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pack_types" (
  "pack_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pack type */,
  "pack_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the pack type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pack type */,
  "pack_type_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the pack type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pack_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Inventory, Sales) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to the report file */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Sales, Inventory) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
